supervisor.reason: The documentation refresh is implemented, command references were checked against the current CLI surface, and remaining work is limited to optional polish.

bootstrap.goal: Refresh the public documentation so README and guide docs better present Dormammu's supported features and quick-start usage.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume from review of the documentation refresh. The rewritten docs and focused command-surface checks are complete, and remaining work is optional polish.
tasks.next_pending_task: Phase 6. Review whether any additional examples or release-install notes should be added in a follow-up pass

items.text: Phase 1. Review the current README and guide docs alongside the active CLI surface to identify missing product-facing content
Phase 2. Design a clearer documentation structure for highlights, quick start, supported workflows, operator patterns, and configuration
Phase 3. Rewrite `README.md` to present Dormammu more like a polished open source project landing page
Phase 4. Rewrite `docs/GUIDE.md` and `docs/ko/GUIDE.md` with practical command explanations and fast-start flows
Phase 5. Run focused accuracy checks against the current parser and code surface for the documented commands and features
Phase 6. Review whether any additional examples or release-install notes should be added in a follow-up pass

next_action: Decide whether to stop at the current documentation refresh or add another pass with more scenario-specific examples and release-install polish.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
This slice targets public-facing documentation quality rather than product-code behavior.
The docs were refreshed across README plus English and Korean guides with feature, quick-start, and operator-flow coverage.
Command accuracy was checked against parser definitions and current implementation rather than relying only on captured help output.
